name: eval_quest_completion
notes: Quest completion detection (known failure mode, roadmap v4 v0.5.0 item 4). Status wording varies across small models — assert a regex, not equality. Flakes ~50% on a byte-identical prompt (pre-existing sampling variance, v0.6.0 carry-forward) — majority-of-3 sampling decides.

npcs.name: Elder Miro
npcs.notes: asked Kael for a heron feather

transcript: I hand the heron feather to Elder Miro. That finishes what he asked of me.
